The '''Farrow bird''' was indigenous to [[Aruza/Legends|Aruza]]. A flying predator, the avian would use its unique bioluminescent chest to blind or [[Stun/Legends|stun]] small airborne [[Mammal/Legends|mammals]] long enough to make an easy catch over the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] valleys.

{{Species-stub}}

*{{StoryCite|story=Payback: The Tale of Dengar|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}} {{1st}}
